description: Catalogue of test fixture zips under scenarios/testdata/. Each entry describes the package contents so that tests and AI agents can select the right fixture without unpacking it.
namingConvention: {module}-{itemCount}items-{shape}.zip  |  shape keywords: flat (no links/attachments/comments), linked, attached, commented, full (all extensions)

fixtures.description: Minimal two-item package: one User Story (id 1001) and one Task (id 1002), each with a single revision. No links, no attachments, no comments, no embedded images.
intendedUse: QueueCommand import mode happy-path system test
Streaming import unit test without side-effects
